Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike Cross- Claims One And Three
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Justin L. Sowa; Gluck Daniel LLP; 415-510-2114; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mauricio Magana Castillo.
A. Thomas Koster; Law Offices of Denise A. Leadbetter; 415-713-8680; appearing on behalf of defendant/cross-complainant Aaron Gruver.

Counsel for cross-complainant Aaron Gruver contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAURICIO MAGANA CASTILLO'S NOTICE OF SPECIAL MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS-CLAIMS ONE AND THREE is GRANTED. Moving party satisfied its burden under the first prong of the anti-slapp. Cross-Complaint asserts claims for Slander of Title and Abuse of Process arising out of protected activity. ("Cross-Defendant filed the Complaint on June 9, 2021, thereafter recorded notices of pendency of action upon Unit 202 and Unit 303, claiming some interest in each of the Subject Properties, and casting doubt upon Cross-Complainant's ownership."). Opposing party failed to show likelihood of prevailing on the merits re: privileged communications. CC 47(b)(4). Lis pendens identified an action "previously filed" in a court of competent jurisdiction that affects title or right to possession of real property, i.e. a claim in a pleading which would, if meritorious, affect title to real property. Alpha & Omega Dev., LP v. Whillock Contracting, Inc. (2012) 200 Cal.App.4th 656. The evidentiary support or merits of such claim are irrelevant to this analysis. Additionally, recordation of lis pendens and filing/maintenance of a lawsuit cannot support a cause of action for abuse of process. Woodcourt II Limited v. McDonald Co. (1981) 119 Cal.App.3d 245; JSJ Limited Partnership v. Mehrban (2012) 205 Cal.App.4th 1512.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
